UCSR0A.description: USART Control and Status Register A for UART flags.
UCSR0A.effect: Reports TX/RX readiness bits such as UDRE0, RXC0, and TXC0.

UCSR0B.description: USART Control and Status Register B for UART enable and interrupts.
UCSR0B.effect: Enables transmitter/receiver and UART interrupt sources.

UCSR0C.description: USART Control and Status Register C for frame format configuration.
UCSR0C.effect: Controls data bits, parity mode, and stop-bit selection.

UBRR0H.description: USART Baud Rate Register high byte.
UBRR0H.effect: Upper byte of baud divisor used with UBRR0L.

UBRR0L.description: USART Baud Rate Register low byte.
UBRR0L.effect: Lower byte of baud divisor used to achieve target baud.

ADCSRA.description: ADC Control and Status Register A.
ADCSRA.effect: Enables ADC, starts conversion, and sets ADC prescaler.

ADMUX.effect: Chooses ADC input channel and voltage reference.

SPCR.effect: Sets SPI mode, master/slave role, and clock rate prescaler bits.
